nasb.text: The world cannot hate you, but it hates Me because I testify of it, that its deeds are evil.

esv.text: The world cannot hate you, but it hates me because I testify about it that its works are evil.

cnv.text: 世人不能恨你們，卻憎恨我，因為我指證他們的行為是邪惡的。

ccb.text: 世人不会恨你们，只会恨我，因为我指证他们行为邪恶。

csbs.text: 世界不能恨你们，却是恨我，因为我见证世界的行为是邪恶的。
